labs.title: Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership
labs.summary: Today, Google DeepMind and A24 are announcing a first-of-its-kind partnership focused on research. This partnership creates a deep research and development collaboration between A24 and Google DeepMind spanning multiple projects over time. This hands-on collaboration provides Google DeepMind with invaluable feedback and guidance from leading artists.

labs.title: Expanding our Heat Resilience data to 50+ global cities
labs.summary: This dataset is being made accessible through a new high-resolution Heat Resilience Earth Engine App. This dataset is open and accessible through our new, high-resolution Heat Resilience Earth Engine App . This platform provides high-resolution rooftop albedo (reflectivity) data to empower proactive municipal planning.

labs.title: Start building with Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash
labs.summary: We’re making it easier to experiment and scale your ideas with Nano Banana 2 Lite, our fastest, most cost-efficient Gemini Image model, and Gemini Omni Flash for high-quality video generation and conversational editing. Today, Gemini Omni Flash (gemini-omni-flash-preview) is rolling to developers via the Gemini API and Google AI Studio, natively supporting high-quality video generation and conversational editing…

labs.title: Introducing TabFM: A zero-shot foundation model for tabular data
labs.summary: We introduce TabFM, a new foundation model for tabular data to simplify classification and regression workflows. Today, we introduce TabFM, a foundation model designed specifically for tabular data classification and regression. By framing tabular prediction as an ICL problem, TabFM eliminates the need for manual model training, hyperparameter tuning , and complex feature engineering.

labs.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
labs.summary: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.

labs.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
labs.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

labs.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
labs.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

labs.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
labs.summary: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.

labs.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
labs.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.

labs.title: Accelerating Gemini Nano models on Pixel with frozen Multi-Token Prediction
labs.summary: Instead of training a separate small language model to draft tokens, we append a lightweight Transformer head, the MTP head, to the final layers of the main model. Gemini Nano token generation impact of MTP vs. app-specific standalone tuned drafter across various Pixel 9 applications. Compared to Pixel 9 and Pixel 10 phones prior to MTP update.

labs.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
labs.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

startups.title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
startups.summary: Forterra , a US builder of autonomous vehicles, revealed today that more than 100 of its self-driving ATVs have been deployed in conflict zones in Ukraine for the past nine months, in what the company believes is the largest deployment of autonomous ground vehicles in combat by any US defense tech company. They’ve also seen the limits of autonomy: For now, Ukranian soldiers have mainly been teleoperating the…

startups.title: Netflix invented binge-watching. Now it may have outgrown it.
startups.summary: Today, Netflix is competing with TikTok, YouTube, Reels, and various microdrama apps. But Netflix won that fight. YouTube and apps like TikTok are Netflix’s real competition, not TV.

startups.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
startups.summary: Last week, researchers at cloud security firm Sysdig said they’d documented the first known case of “agentic ransomware.” It was an extortion operation, dubbed JadePuffer, in which an AI agent — not a human — handled the technical execution of a real-world cyberattack from start to finish. The agent broke into a vulnerable server, stole credentials, moved through the target’s network, encrypted files, and even wrote…

startups.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
startups.summary: South Korean memory chipmaker SK Hynix, rival to Samsung and U.S.-based Micron , is planning to sell nearly 17.8 million shares in a U.S. Should its shares sell well (and there’s indication that they will), the company could raise around $28 billion, based on SK Hynix’s closing share price last Friday in Seoul, Bloomberg reports . As hyperscalers like Amazon, Microsoft, Google, and Oracle race to build out so-called…

startups.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
startups.summary: The second killer app of agents is the internal agent that helps you run the company. And another tool is Vercel Sandbox, where you put the agent in a little cage. The data doesn’t lie.

startups.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
startups.summary: With the latest iOS 27 developer beta, Apple is giving testers an early look at one of the upcoming improvements to its AI-powered Siri : the ability to adjust how quickly and expressively the AI assistant speaks. In iOS 27 beta 3, out today, Apple has enabled the voice controls for “Pace” and “Expressivity” that were previously labeled as “Coming soon” in the first developer beta releases. You can customize Siri’s…

startups.title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
startups.summary: Oracle — June 22, 2026. GitLab — June 3, 2026. Oracle — March 5-31, 2026.

startups.title: Amazon competitor Bookshop.org says Kobo eReader support will happen this year after all
startups.summary: One solution for Kobo owners, originally promised for 2025, was a partnership with Bookshop.org , an Amazon competitor that supports local bookshops with every order. Bookshop.org currently offers e-books through its mobile app for iOS and Android. Obviously, whether or not Bookshop.org ever figures out Kobo support, Kobo users don’t have to buy all their books from Japanese-based e-commerce giant Rakuten.

startups.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
startups.summary: Similarly, if you use the newer Search Live feature to search via voice input in the Google app, those audio recordings could be saved, as can any other Google voice search. You can change your preferences on the Search Services History and Search Services Personalization pages. Before this update, Google let you configure what historical search data was saved via its “Web & App Activity” settings.

startups.title: Apple brings back card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after a four-year hiatus
startups.summary: In May 2022, Apple suspended card payments in India following changes to the country’s recurring payments framework. Since then, users have relied on UPI, India’s real-time payments network, net banking, and Apple Account balance for subscriptions and other Apple digital purchases. Apple has not announced any plans to launch the mobile payments service in India.

startups.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
startups.summary: The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest, with Xbox losing 1,600 staffers today, according to memos shared with Microsoft’s staff. The Xbox layoffs come as the gaming industry shrinks amid new generative AI opportunities. Last year, Microsoft laid off about 15,000 employees across two rounds.

startups.title: Reddit is using LLMs to solve a problem LLMs largely created
startups.summary: It’s easier than ever for bad actors to spew spam across the internet as powerful large language models (LLMs) become effortlessly accessible. According to the platform, Reddit blocks 23 million spam views per day and catches about 25,000 new spam posts and comments each day. Social platforms have been building automated spam reduction tools for years, but Reddit says these updated tools are catching spam at a…
